heading: Credit of receipts
label: 9a Credit of receipts
text: All moneys hereinafter received by the Department of Labor in payment of the cost of such work shall be deposited to the credit of the appropriation of that bureau, service, office, division, or other agency of the Department of Labor which supervised such work, and may be used, in the discretion of the Secretary of Labor, and notwithstanding any other provision of law, for the ordinary expenses of such agency and/or to secure the special services of persons who are neither officers nor employees of the United States.1So in original. Probably should be “hereafter”.1
notes: CodificationThis section and sections 9 and 9b of this title comprised sections 1 to 3 of act , which were to terminate one year after , pursuant to section 4 of act , set out as a Codification note under . Such sections were temporarily extended by acts , and , and were made permanent by act .Apr. 13, 1934Apr. 13, 1934Apr. 13, 1934Apr. 11, 1935June 15, 1937Apr. 15, 1939section 9 of this title
